raw_text: Hi, I'm looking for a quote on 3 sash windows for my cottage. They need to be roughly 1.2m wide by 1.5m tall, in oak if possible. Would need them installed by the end of August as we're doing a renovation. Thanks, Mary

Good morning, we are a building contractor working on a new-build site in Coleraine and need pricing for 14 casement windows, all the same size (900mm x 1200mm), softwood, painted white. This is for a residential development so we'd need a trade quote. Timeline is flexible but ideally materials on site within 6 weeks. Regards, J. Hamilton, Hamilton Construction

Hello, urgent enquiry - we had storm damage to a fire door at our care home and need a replacement fire door fitted ASAP, this week if at all possible. Door is a standard internal size, 762mm x 1981mm. Please call me back today on 07911 222333. Sandra, Riverside Care

Hi there, just wondering if you do sliding sash windows and roughly what the cost would be for a pair, around 1.4 x 1.8m each, timber, traditional style for a listed building. No rush on timing, just gathering quotes at this stage. Thank you, Peter

Hi, can you give me a price for a single oak front door, 838mm x 1981mm, with two side panels of glazing? We are hoping to have this installed before Christmas as a gift to ourselves after a long renovation! No exact deadline but sooner is better. Many thanks, Aoife

To whom it may concern, we require 6 tilt and turn windows for a commercial office fit-out, dimensions 1000mm x 1400mm each, aluminium-clad timber if available, RAL 7016 finish. Project completion is fixed for 10 weeks from order, this is a hard deadline tied to a lease handover. Please advise lead times. Best, David, Northway Property Group

Hello, I'm renovating my kitchen and would like 2 french doors leading out to the garden, each panel about 0.9m x 2.1m, oak, double glazed. Not in a rush, maybe install in spring next year. What sort of price range am I looking at? Thanks, Tom

Hi, this is urgent - our shopfront fire door failed inspection and we have a re-inspection booked for Friday. Need a compliant fire door, standard commercial size 900mm x 2100mm, fitted before then if at all possible. Please call ASAP, this is time critical for our business licence. Liam, Magherafelt Newsagents

Good afternoon, just enquiring about reversible windows for a school refurbishment project, we'd need approximately 22 units, mixed sizes, will send a schedule if you can do a budget estimate first. Project is in early planning, no firm dates yet but likely next academic year. Kind regards, Procurement Team, Glenview Primary School

Hi, looking for a like for like replacement of one casement window that got smashed by accident, 800mm x 1000mm, softwood painted, nothing fancy. Would appreciate this done within the next two weeks if possible as it's letting the weather in. Karen
